_description: A carbon accounting and ESG reporting SaaS for SMBs.
idea_normalised: A carbon accounting and ESG reporting platform for SMBs — automatically imports Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions from accounting software and generates audit-ready ESG reports.

brand_config.logo_concept: A leaf integrated with a ledger or balance sheet
brand_config.target_audience: CFOs and sustainability officers at SMBs (50-500 employees) facing ESG reporting mandates

features: QuickBooks and Xero integration for expense categorisation
GHG Protocol and TCFD-aligned reporting frameworks
Carbon offset marketplace with verified credits

problem: SEC and EU CSRD mandates make ESG reporting mandatory but complex
Existing tools cost $50K+ and are built for enterprises
SMBs lack the data science expertise to calculate Scope 3 emissions
lean_canvas_json.solution: Automated carbon accounting that turns accounting data into audit-ready ESG reports in hours
lean_canvas_json.unique_value_proposition: ESG reporting that takes hours, not months — built for SMBs, not just enterprises
lean_canvas_json.unfair_advantage: Accounting software integrations automate 80% of data collection with zero manual entry

personas.name: Sarah
pain_points: Board demanding ESG report by Q1
Data scattered across QuickBooks and spreadsheets
